faq.question: How much should it cost to install windows?
faq.answer: For windows windows, typical pricing is a range set by frame material, glass and size. Installed Bay Area totals also reflect labor, permits and any opening repairs, which Deluxe Windows confirms in a written estimate.

faq.question: What is the correct way to install a window?
faq.answer: Professional installation of windows follows measured openings, square-and-plumb setting, insulation, flashing and sealing, then an operating check. Deluxe Windows schedules most Bay Area projects within one to three days on site.

faq.question: Which window materials can I compare at Deluxe Windows?
faq.answer: Vinyl, wood, wood-clad, aluminum, aluminum-clad, fiberglass and steel windows are all available, and the showroom lets homeowners compare frames and glass side by side.

faq.question: What determines replacement window pricing?
faq.answer: Installed window pricing depends on material, brand, style, dimensions, glass package, finish, quantity and access. Whole-house projects usually earn better per-window pricing than single openings.
